name: Generic_Real_Linear_Equations

documentation.description:
Suffix "_JS" was added to address ambiguity with
Ada 2005's Ada.Numerics.Generic_Real_Arrays.Determinant, .Inverse, .Solve, ...

subprograms.name: Cholesky_Solve
subprograms.code:
function Cholesky_Solve (L : Real_Matrix;
                         Y : Real_Vector) return Real_Vector

subprograms.name: Crout_Solve
subprograms.code:
function Crout_Solve (A : Real_Matrix;
                      Y : Real_Vector) return Real_Vector

subprograms.name: LU_Decomposition
LU_Solve
QR_Decomposition
QR_Solve
Solve_JS
subprograms.code:
function Solve_JS (A : Real_Matrix;
                   Y : Real_Matrix) return Real_Matrix

subprograms.name: Solve_JS
subprograms.code:
function Solve_JS (A : Real_Matrix;
                   Y : Real_Vector) return Real_Vector

subprograms.name: SV_Decomposition
SV_Solve

formals.name: Integer_Vector
formals.code: type Integer_Vector is array (Integer range <>) of Integer;

formals.name: Real_Arrays
formals.code: with package Real_Arrays is new Ada.Numerics.Generic_Real_Arrays (Real);
